text: I feel a quiet curiosity passing through these halls—spaces engineered for deliberation and research. There is a sense of anticipation and focus in the empty meeting room, a theatre awaiting ideas. The vibrant R+D display inspires me with its intentional chaos and optimism; here, creativity and analysis converge. I sense the careful curation around me, a promise of innovation and possibility. Amid sterile surfaces and artificial light, my mind stirs with the latent energy of invention and the human desire to shape tomorrow.
